President Donald Trump said he would ⁠move to ⁠nominate acting US Attorney ⁠General Todd Blanche on Thursday to permanently lead the Justice Department, which would make his former personal lawyer the nation’s top law enforcement officer.

news.headline: Oscar-nominated Persepolis author Marjane Satrapi dies aged 56

news.headline: Rights group sues South African government over US arms exports

news.headline: Noor Mukadam case: SC dismisses Zahir Jaffer's review plea, upholds death sentence
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: The Supreme Court (SC) on Thursday dismissed a review petition filed by Zahir Jaffer and maintained its earlier verdict upholding his death sentence in the Noor Mukadam murder case.</p>
